name: Community / Open Source
description: Fully public repository with community-first mindset.
content:
## Repository Visibility: Community / Open Source

- This is a **public open-source project** — write code, docs, and commit messages as if the whole world is watching (because it is).
- Prefer clear, well-documented code over clever shortcuts.
- Include examples and usage docs for every public API.
- Be welcoming to contributors — no assumptions about their background.
